arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin refusing to let semi-final play into thinking as Aberdeen and Celtic prepare for battle
arts.sum: Aberdeen boss Jimmy Thelin has spoken ahead of his side’s home clash against Celtic in the Scottish Premiership this evening. Following a run of one win in five matches, Aberdeen know that Celtic could extend the gap at the top to seven points should another victory be forthcoming.

arts.ttl: What James Forrest told reporters about finishing his career at Celtic
arts.sum: “When I get older, I have realised, especially the last couple of years when you are in the Celtic bubble and winning league titles, playing in the Champions League, then I don’t think there is much better. “I never really thought about it,” said Forrest about ending his career at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Celtic Predicted XI vs Aberdeen as Brendan Rodgers has to mull over stick or twist scenarios
arts.sum: Your predicted XI in full is: Schmeichel, Johnston, Carter-Vickers, Trusty, Valle, McGregor, Bernardo, McCowan, Kuhn, Maeda, Kyogo. Post-match, Rodgers admitted he doesn’t have defined Celtic starters and backs the majority of his squad to come in and deliver no matter the occasion.

arts.ttl: Player open to leaving Celtic in January – ‘Shame’ situation with Brendan Rodgers’ side changed
arts.sum: Celtic’s Luis Palma has lost prominence under Brendan Rodgers this season and has been limited to 183 minutes of action from seven matches. The winger’s situation at Celtic has gone from bad to worse since the start of October, with him clocking in just 77 minutes. In fact, the Honduras international has enjoyed more minutes The post Player open to leaving Celtic in January – ‘Shame’ situation with Brendan Rodgers’ side changed appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'They play serious football' – Dinamo Zagreb supporters prepare for Celtic UCL visit
arts.sum: Celtic play Dinamo Zagreb next week on matchday six of the UEFA Champions League

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers faces 6 Celtic decisions for Aberdeen as Ross County rout hands him headache – predicted XI
arts.sum: It's a big top of the table showdown at Pittodrie this evening in the third meeting between these sides this term

arts.ttl: Hartson paints bleak picture for Celtic winger with replacement tipped for January
arts.sum: The former Celtic striker reckons this player's departure is a question of when not if

arts.ttl: Three Celtic players who passed Ross County off the park who deserve to start vs Aberdeen
arts.sum: Whilst Callum McGregor and Luke McCowan drew most of the plaudits, there were three Celtic fringe players who passed Ross County off the park and who all deserve to start against Aberdeen tomorrow night. Paulo Bernardo and James Forrest were excellent for Celtic vs Ross County

arts.ttl: Henrik Larsson dissects the best Celtic goal of the 21st century blow-by-blow
arts.sum: The King of Kings explores the goal that Celtic fans still talk about to this day

arts.ttl: 'Why Celtic paid that money…' Barry Ferguson issues honest verdict on Auston Trusty
arts.sum: Barry Ferguson says Auston Trusty starting to prove why Celtic signed him Liam Scales was one of the guys to come into the XI – for Auston Trusty – and he proceeded to score after previously being benched by the American.
